svg.title: DFP Production Inference Architecture
svg.desc: Full pipeline from three Kafka topics through aggregation, GPU inference, Triton/TensorRT, and Prometheus monitoring

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Kafka consumer work for topic A (numerical/ordinal)?')
sendPrompt('How does the Kafka consumer work for topic B (nominal)?')
sendPrompt('How does the Kafka consumer work for topic C (text)?')
sendPrompt('What does TopicConsumer do in the ingestion module?')
sendPrompt('What does TopicConsumer do in the ingestion module?')
sendPrompt('What does TopicConsumer do in the ingestion module?')
sendPrompt('How is the shared queue implemented between consumers and the aggregator?')
sendPrompt('Explain the sliding-window aggregator in detail')
g.text: sliding window join · drain_complete() · evict stale partials

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does StreamPreprocessor do and how does it reuse fitted transforms?')
g.text: scale · encode · embed (SentenceTransformer on GPU) → tensor

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does torch.compile do and when should I use it over TensorRT?')
sendPrompt('Explain how TensorRT compiles the autoencoder and the trade-offs')
sendPrompt('When should I use Triton Inference Server for this pipeline?')

svg.text: ← choose one approach; Triton wraps either of the others →

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the anomaly threshold computed and applied?')
sendPrompt('What Prometheus metrics should I define for the DFP pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How do I expose the /metrics endpoint for Prometheus scraping?')
sendPrompt('What Grafana panels should I build for the DFP anomaly detection dashboard?')
